collections.description: Islamic remembrances to recite in the morning

adhkar.text: أصبحنا وأصبح الملك لله والحمد لله لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شيء قدير
adhkar.englishTranslation: We have reached the morning and at this very time unto Allah belongs all sovereignty, and all praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.

adhkar.text: اللهم بك أصبحنا وبك أمسينا وبك نحيا وبك نموت وإليك النشور
adhkar.englishTranslation: O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the morning and by Your leave we have reached the evening, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our resurrection.
How perfect Allah is and I praise Him.

adhkar.text: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له له الملك وله الحمد وهو على كل شيء قدير
adhkar.englishTranslation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.

adhkar.text: أعوذ بكلمات الله التامات من شر ما خلق
adhkar.englishTranslation: I take refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

collections.description: Islamic remembrances to recite in the evening

adhkar.text: أمسينا وأمسى الملك لله والحمد لله لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له
adhkar.englishTranslation: We have reached the evening and at this very time unto Allah belongs all sovereignty, and all praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.

adhkar.text: اللهم بك أمسينا وبك أصبحنا وبك نحيا وبك نموت وإليك المصير
adhkar.englishTranslation: O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the evening and by Your leave we have reached the morning, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our return.

collections.description: Islamic remembrances before going to sleep

adhkar.englishTranslation: In Your name O Allah, I live and die.

collections.description: Islamic remembrances to recite after prayer

adhkar.englishTranslation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah.

adhkar.text: اللهم أنت السلام ومنك السلام تباركت يا ذا الجلال والإكرام
adhkar.englishTranslation: O Allah, You are As-Salam and from You is all peace, blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honour.

adhkar.text: لا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله
adhkar.englishTranslation: There is no might nor power except with Allah.

adhkar.text: اللهم صل وسلم على نبينا محمد
adhkar.englishTranslation: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
